summary: Made surgical seam edits to acknowledge the missed morning Nora check-in from Chapter 6 and strengthen the brake-thread handoff into Chapter 8.
edits: Added a line at the bridge noting the 8:15 a.m. Eastern check-in window passing without Eli calling.
Marked the later Nora call as overdue and inserted Nora's direct acknowledgment of the missed morning check-in.
Added a light steering-wheel tick beat near the ending to bridge into Chapter 8's brake/alignment opening.
